mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM course WHERE code = #{code}

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.code, c.credit FROM course c WHERE c.deleted = 0
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY c.id DESC

SELECT c.id, c.name, c.code, c.credit FROM course c INNER JOIN course_teacher ct ON ct.course_id = c.id AND ct.teacher_id = #{teacherId} WHERE c.deleted = 0
AND c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY c.id DESC
